pageDescription: Manage personal prompt presets that can be inserted from chat with /. Admin-managed built-in prompts are available automatically.
description: Create personal prompts that can be triggered with /.
emptyDescription: Create one and type / in chat to insert it.
dialogDescription: A prompt maintained by the user for quick insertion in chat.
viewDescription: A prompt maintained by the platform for quick insertion in chat. Users can view it only and cannot edit it.
deleteDescription: After deletion, this prompt will no longer appear in the / picker. This action cannot be undone.
name: Name
tooLong: Name can be up to 64 characters, description up to 256 characters, and content up to 10000 characters.
skillDialogDescription: Each skill is defined by one SKILL.md. When loaded, it is used only as context for the current turn and does not run commands.
skillViewDescription: A platform-managed skill. Users can view and load it in chat; when loaded, it is context only and does not run commands.
deleteSkillDescription: After deletion, this skill will no longer appear in the / picker. This action cannot be undone.
skillsEmptyDescription: Create one and type / in chat to load it as context when needed.
skillTooLong: Name can be up to 64 characters, description up to 256 characters, and SKILL.md up to 10000 characters.
